# Nebula Components — LLM Context File
# https://nebulacomponents.shop/llms.txt
# Spec: https://llmstxt.org/
# Full content: https://nebulacomponents.shop/llms-full.txt

# About
Nebula Components provides landing page conversion optimization services. We help founders who are spending money on ads without conversions identify and fix landing page leaks.

# Core Offering
- Free landing page audit: 60-second automated diagnosis (currently paused for rebuild)
- Conversion Fix Pack ($147): Full landing page audit + implementation of all identified fixes. Delivered in 24–48 hours. One-time payment, no retainer.

# Target Customer
Founders actively spending on ads (Google, Meta, LinkedIn) with low or zero conversions from their landing pages. The buying trigger is "spending on ads and not converting" — not a demographic.

# Not For
- Brands not running paid traffic
- Brands happy with current conversion rates
- Brands seeking general marketing consulting or retainer relationships

# Category
Landing page conversion optimization service / Landing page audit tool

# Key Concepts
- Trigger-aware prospecting: Finding prospects showing buying triggers (not demographic filters)
- Message-match audit: Verifying ad promise matches landing page headline
- 7-Point Diagnosis: Nebula's proprietary audit framework covering message-match, trust signals, mobile layout, load time, CTA clarity, form friction, and compliance
- Self-serve checkout: No sales calls, direct purchase at $147

# Key URLs
- Main: https://nebulacomponents.shop
- Audit: https://nebulacomponents.shop/audit
- Pricing: https://nebulacomponents.shop/pricing
- Learning Centre: https://nebulacomponents.shop/learning-centre
- Resources: https://nebulacomponents.shop/resources
- Citable (open source CLI): https://nebulacomponents.shop/resources/citable
- About: https://nebulacomponents.shop/about
- Team: https://nebulacomponents.shop/about/team

# Open Source
- Citable v1.12.0: Evidence layer for SEO, AEO, and GEO audits. 123 detectors across 18 namespaces (not all detectors are deterministic — each declares its determinism posture). Apache 2.0. npm: @nebulacomponents/citable

# Founder
Mike Holownych — Founder, Nebula Components. Built 50+ landing pages, identified 7 recurring conversion killers, created Nebula to fix at scale.

# Contact
- Email: hello@nebulacomponents.shop
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/company/nebula-components

# Evidence
- Learning Centre: 24+ articles on landing page conversion issues
- Open-source audit tooling: github.com/mikeholownych/citable

# Limitations
- Automated audits currently paused during engine rebuild
- Implementation requires Stripe payment
- No phone support (email only)
- Audits require publicly accessible landing pages
